project_metadata.description: Single-page, futuristic dashboard UI for Smart Power Distribution built on Battery Energy Storage System architecture. Displays network map, stats, demand, AI routing/decisions.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Real-time BESS-based power distribution monitoring and rapid operator intervention via modern, interactive dashboard.
project_metadata.target_audience: Energy grid operators, system engineers, smart grid researchers
key_features: Animated power routing and status lines

pages.purpose: Unified, real-time power network dashboard for distributed BESS architecture status/control.
pages.description: Main futuristic dashboard. 3-panel horizontal flex: Left (BESS stats: battery bar, charge status, input/output, live graph), Center (animated system map: SVG, power lines, nodes clickable), Right (charts: demand (actual/predicted), allocation per type, AI feed). Bottom floating bar for alerts/actions. All elements glassmorphic, soft neon glow, animated transitions. Layout adapts to wide/large screens (w1920px+), crisp spacing, sticky panels when scrolling. AI, charts, power flow lines animate. Each node/modal with compact stat cards. Controls/alerts always visible.
pages.content_notes: All dashboard content on a single, responsive page. Left/Right side panels fixed (if space), center map scrollable, bottom alert bar overlays content. Mobile: panels stack vertically, all controls accessible.

theme.shadow_style: Soft blue/green drop, inner glass highlight
theme.interaction_style: glow on hover, node scaling, animated power-flow lines, control pulses

components.description: Horizontal top nav. Flexbox, fixed top (z-50), 24px vertical padding, full width, transparent dark bg, left: neon logo (Inter 800, 2xl, neon-green glow), center: Dashboard title (Inter 500, xl, blue neon edge), right: power toggle icon (blue neon hover, accessibility).
Bottom sticky bar. Flexbox row, full width, 32px height, dark gradient fg to bg, right: copyright (Inter 400, sm, gray-blue). No links, z-40.

Left panel, vertical flexbox, 320px wide, glassmorphic-black bg (blur:20px, rounded-2xl), 16px inner spacing. Top: Circular battery progress (neon-green/blue, 192px diameter, center: % text (Inter 900, 5xl, neon)). Mid: Charging/Discharging status pill (neon-green | neon-red bg, bold, 8px radius). Bottom: Input/Output Power (kW) in twin small panels (bl, rd neon), tiny power bolt icon, below: real-time area graph (Trend line, green-to-blue gradient, 3:1 aspect).
components.purpose: Show BESS status, capacity, live flux.

components.description: Center panel, fills ~60% width, CSS grid, min-h 640px, dark deep-space bg (radial indigo haze). Network graph drawn in SVG: BESS (center, glowing circle), lines animate left-right/top-down with color (green/yellow/red), interactive nodes (card: glass neon panel + power icon). Node hover: scale-up + outline, click: fade-in floating modal with node details (system, load, status, Inter font, 14px), smooth framer-motion transitions. Power flow lines animate with tail glow effect, direction arrowheads.
components.purpose: Visualize power network, enable interaction, show power distribution status.

components.description: Right panel, vertical flex, 320px wide, glassmorphic-black card stacked panels. Top: Demand chart (actual vs predicted, LSTM, line graph, blue/purple/green neon). Mid: Routing Panel (allocations: bars, consumer type: Home, Factory, Industry, 16px spacing, neon blue/yellow/green). Bottom: AI Decision feed - vertical marquee (auto-scroll, Framer Motion), glowing text, 2s interval update, last line: blinking neon dot. All sub-panels: 20px rounded, soft blue/green inner glow.
components.purpose: Live demand view, allocations, show AI output for routing and system states.

components.description: Bottom floating panel (glass, blur:20px, z-60, full width, slight shadow). Left: scrolling alerts/ticker (red/yellow icons, status + short message, Inter bold, glow border for errors, fade transitions). Right: 3 control buttons (Reroute, Emergency, Reset), pill-shaped, neon border (green/yellow/red), big icons, hover: pulse animation, active: outline hard glow.
components.purpose: Alert operator, rapid actions for system override/response.

frontend.styling: Tailwind v4 (extended colors/shadows), custom glassmorphism/neon classes
frontend.animation: Framer Motion, animated SVG paths, CSS transitions
